message:
refactor(core): add broadcast channel alias to runtime_compat and migrate events.rs

runtime_compat.rs (+13 lines):
- Add `pub mod broadcast` re-exporting `tokio::sync::broadcast::{
  Receiver, Sender, channel, error::{RecvError, SendError, TryRecvError}}`
- This centralizes the broadcast channel call site alongside the
  existing mpsc and watch aliases, preparing for eventual executor
  portability while keeping the current tokio backend

events.rs (+14/-14):
- Replace `tokio::sync::broadcast` import with
  `crate::runtime_compat::broadcast`
- Update error pattern matches from `broadcast::error::RecvError::*`
  to `broadcast::RecvError::*` (flattened re-export path)
- Same for `TryRecvError` in `try_recv()`
- Update module-level doc comment: "tokio's broadcast channels" →
  "runtime-compat broadcast channels"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
